problem_statement: Given the head of a singly linked list containing integers, shift the elements of the linked list to the right by k places and return the head of the modified list. Do not change the values of the nodes, only change the links between nodes.

examples.explanation:
List after 1 shift to right: head -> 5 -> 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4.
List after 2 shift to right: head -> 4 -> 5 -> 1 -> 2 -> 3.

List after 1 shift to right: head -> 5 -> 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4.
List after 2 shift to right: head -> 4 -> 5 -> 1 -> 2 -> 3.
List after 3 shift to right: head -> 3 -> 4 -> 5 -> 1 -> 2.
List after 4 shift to right: head -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5 -> 1.
